pageContext.name: Luke vs Darth Vader
pageContext.description: A limited edition of 500 individually numbered pieces worldwide.  Luke, already reeling from a catastrophic injury dealt by Vader, finally faces what he now realizes to be a terrible but undeniable truth. Only one choice presents itself to the young Skywalker.  Crucial elements stand out in stark contrast against the somber matte black of the maintenance platform, focussing all attention on this pivotal moment in 1980's Star Wars: Episode V - The Empire Strikes Back.
